articles.title: Boys Basketball Sets Scoring Season High Against Wilson
articles.author: The Railsplitter Staff
articles.dek: Lincoln High’s Wilson Wilson scored a game-high 26 points against Wilson on Friday, February 28, leading the Lincoln…
articles.body:
Lincoln High’s Wilson Wilson scored a game-high 26 points against Wilson on Friday, February 28, leading the Lincoln boys basketball team to a 78-46 victory. The Railsplitters dominated the game, outscoring the Wildcats in all four quarters. Wilson led the Railsplitters in scoring with 26 points, followed by Ethaniel Roberson with 16 points and Marcus Medina with 15 points. Lincoln’s defense was equally strong, holding Wilson to just 46 points.

Wilson started the game strong, taking an early 10-point lead in the first quarter. However, Lincoln quickly responded, tying the game at 20 by the end of the first quarter. The second quarter saw Lincoln pull away, outscoring Wilson 25-12 to take a 45-32 halftime lead. The Railsplitters continued their dominance in the second half, outscoring Wilson 33-14 to secure the victory.

Lincoln’s offense was clicking on all cylinders, with four players scoring in double figures. Roberson, Medina, and Curtis Miras also contributed significantly to the win, with Roberson scoring 16 points, Medina adding 15 points, and Miras chipping in 10 points. The team’s offensive prowess was evident throughout the game, as they consistently found ways to score.

Lincoln’s defense was also a key factor in the victory. They held Wilson to just 46 points, a testament to their hard work and dedication. The Railsplitters’ defense was suffocating, forcing turnovers and limiting Wilson’s scoring opportunities. The team’s defensive intensity was a major reason for their blowout win.

The Railsplitters’ victory over Wilson was a dominant performance from start to finish. They outscored their opponent in every quarter, demonstrating their superiority on both offense and defense. With this win, Lincoln improves to 12-0 in league play and 25-3 overall. The Railsplitters will look to continue their winning streak as they head into the CIF playoffs.

articles.title: All the World's a Stage!
articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: New Theater Arts Building Opens at LHS
articles.body:
The new theater arts building at Lincoln High School is a testament to the school's commitment to the arts. The building, which officially opened its doors on February 14, is a state-of-the-art facility that will provide students with a space to explore their creativity and hone their theatrical skills. The building features a black box theater, a scene shop, costume shop, and a dance studio. The theater arts program at Lincoln High School has a long history of excellence, and the new building will only further enhance its reputation.

The new theater arts building is a culmination of years of planning and fundraising. The project, which cost $14 million, was funded by a combination of public and private donations. The building is a much-needed addition to the school, as the existing theater facilities were outdated and inadequate. The new building will allow the theater arts program to expand its offerings and provide students with a more comprehensive theater education.

The black box theater is a versatile space that can be used for a variety of productions. It is equipped with a state-of-the-art lighting and sound system, as well as a flexible seating arrangement. The scene shop is where students will learn to build and design sets for productions. The costume shop will provide students with the opportunity to learn about costume design and construction. The dance studio will be used for dance classes and rehearsals.

The new theater arts building is more than just a building; it is a symbol of Lincoln High School's commitment to the arts. It is a place where students can explore their creativity, develop their talents, and express themselves. The building will undoubtedly play a vital role in the lives of Lincoln High School students for years to come.

articles.title: Reasons Your New Year's Resolutions Work (and Same, They Don't)
articles.author: Elliami Gabriel
articles.dek: All around the world, on December 31, people come together to annually celebrate the passing of the old year and the beginning of the new.
articles.body:
All around the world, on December 31, people come together to annually celebrate the passing of the old year and the beginning of the new. What better way to ring in the new year than with a new set of resolutions? What better time to start fresh and new than at the beginning of the year?

For a week or two, things appear to get off to a grand start; gyms are nearly empty on the first day, but slowly fill up. Walking into a gym for the first time, I am nervous, as I have never been. But once I am inside, I notice that the atmosphere is one of welcome and encouragement. As I walk toward the machines, I feel a sense of purpose. Every person there is in their own world, but they are all working toward a common goal: to better themselves. It’s a beautiful thing to witness.

However, the problem arises when the gym starts to fill up. Many people get discouraged and quit. They are not able to handle the pressure of being in a crowded gym. But, I, for one, am not discouraged. Instead, I am motivated. I see the people who are working hard, and I want to be like them. I want to be able to push myself to my limits and achieve my goals. I know that it is not going to be easy, but I am willing to put in the work. I am willing to make the sacrifices. I am willing to do whatever it takes to succeed.

There are many reasons why people fail their New Year’s resolutions. One of the most common reasons is that they set unrealistic goals. They want to lose 30 pounds in a month, or they want to run a marathon without any prior training. When they don’t achieve their goals, they get discouraged and give up. Another reason why people fail their New Year’s resolutions is that they don’t have a plan. They just have a vague idea of what they want to achieve, but they don’t have a concrete plan of action. When they don’t have a plan, they are more likely to get sidetracked and give up.

It is important to have a plan when you are setting New Year’s resolutions. You need to have a clear idea of what you want to achieve, and you need to have a concrete plan of action. You also need to be realistic about your goals. You can’t expect to achieve everything overnight. It is important to set achievable goals, and to celebrate your successes along the way. If you do this, you will be more likely to stick with your resolutions and achieve your goals.

articles.title: Update on the Phone Ban
articles.author: Alma Santiago
articles.dek: Lincoln High School’s new ban on cell phones is causing a stir among students.
articles.body:
Lincoln High School’s new ban on cell phones is causing a stir among students. The ban, which went into effect on February 3, prohibits students from using their phones during class time. The ban has been met with mixed reactions from students, with some students supportive of the ban and others critical of it.

Those who support the ban say that it will help to reduce distractions in the classroom and improve academic performance. They believe that cell phones are a major distraction for students, and that the ban will help to create a more focused learning environment. They also believe that the ban will help to reduce cyberbullying and other online harassment.

Those who are critical of the ban say that it is too restrictive and that it will not be effective. They believe that cell phones are a valuable tool for learning, and that the ban will prevent students from using their phones for educational purposes. They also believe that the ban will not be effective in preventing students from using their phones, as they will simply find ways to circumvent the ban.

The school administration has stated that the ban is necessary to ensure that all students have an equal opportunity to learn. They believe that the ban will help to create a more equitable learning environment, and that it will also help to reduce distractions and improve academic performance. The administration has also stated that they will be working with students to ensure that the ban is implemented in a way that is fair and effective.

The ban on cell phones at Lincoln High School is a complex issue with a variety of perspectives. It remains to be seen whether the ban will be effective in achieving its goals. However, the school administration is committed to working with students to ensure that the ban is implemented in a way that is fair and effective.

articles.title: Deck the Halls: The Annual Christmas Concert
articles.author: Adrian Espinoza
articles.dek: The annual Christmas concert was held on December 13 in the Lincoln High School auditorium.
articles.body:
The annual Christmas concert was held on December 13 in the Lincoln High School auditorium. The concert featured performances by the school’s choir, orchestra, and band. The concert was a festive occasion, with the auditorium decorated in Christmas lights and decorations. The audience was treated to a variety of Christmas carols and other holiday music.

The choir performed a selection of Christmas carols, including "Jingle Bells," "Silent Night," and "O Holy Night." The choir’s performance was a beautiful and moving rendition of these classic songs. The orchestra performed a medley of Christmas songs, including "Sleigh Ride," "Winter Wonderland," and "The Nutcracker Suite." The orchestra’s performance was a spirited and lively rendition of these popular tunes.

The band performed a selection of Christmas music, including "Rudolph the Red-Nosed Reindeer," "Frosty the Snowman," and "Santa Claus is Comin' to Town." The band’s performance was a fun and upbeat rendition of these holiday favorites. The concert was a great success, and it was a wonderful way to celebrate the Christmas season. The students did a wonderful job, and the audience enjoyed every minute of it. It was a great way to kick off the holiday season, and it was a great way to bring the community together.

articles.title: Party Down Broadway North at the Lincoln High School Christmas Parade

articles.dek: The 20th annual Lincoln High School parade was held on Broadway.
articles.body:

The choir and band followed closely behind, dressed in their festive holiday attire. The kids dancing to songs from Wicked and others dancing to Cha Cha Real Smooth songs. The parade began from Lincoln Park Ave and ending on Workman, once the parade was over people went to the Lincoln High School football field for the Christmas parade and food.

A student from Lincoln High Youth Center who does boxing, participated in the parade and said that “It was a fun experience yet since it was last year and we included some workouts to make it fun for everyone”. Along with the students, members of the community also participated in the parade. There were many floats from local businesses and organizations, as well as a number of individual participants. The parade was a festive and enjoyable event for all who attended. The parade was a great way to celebrate the holiday season and to bring the community together.

articles.title: How M.E.CH.A at Lincoln High School Keeps Culture and Community Alive

articles.body:
M.E.CH.A. (Movimiento Estudiantil Chicano de Aztlan) is an important cultural and activist group that serves to foster leadership, arts clubs, and cultural clubs. For the Latino Community at Lincoln, M.E.CH.A. (Movimiento Estudiantil Chicano de Aztlan) serves as an important cultural and activist group that serves to foster leadership, arts clubs, and cultural clubs. Currently, M.E.CH.A. collaborates with members of the Lincoln Heights Neighborhood Council and participates in events that educate others about its history and ancestral heritage. This year, the group has organized and hosted events that educate others about the community’s history and ancestral heritage. These events include a Dia de los Muertos celebration, a traditional Mexican holiday that honors deceased loved ones, and a performance by a traditional Mexican folk dance troupe. M.E.CH.A. also hosts a yearly mural painting event that brings together students, artists, and community members to create a public mural that depicts the history and culture of Lincoln Heights. The organization has also been involved in a number of other community initiatives, such as a voter registration drive and a food drive for low-income families.

M.E.CH.A. is more than just a club; it is a movement. It is a way of life. It is a commitment to making a difference in the world. The organization offers tutoring and mentoring programs, as well as opportunities for leadership development and professional networking. M.E.CH.A. also has a scholarship fund that provides financial assistance to students who are pursuing higher education. The organization has a strong sense of community and a deep commitment to social justice. The members of M.E.CH.A. are passionate about their culture and their heritage, and they are dedicated to making a positive impact on their community.

M.E.CH.A. at Lincoln High School is an important organization that plays a vital role in the school and the community. It is a group that is dedicated to preserving and promoting Latino culture, and to empowering the next generation of leaders. The organization has a strong sense of community and a deep commitment to social justice. articles.title: Setting a Goal
articles.author: Elsa Daily
articles.dek: Student tips to reset your year off right.
articles.body:
The new year is a time for reflection and setting new goals. For many, the new year is a chance to start fresh and make positive changes in their lives. However, it can be difficult to know where to start. This article offers tips for setting goals that will help you make the most of the new year.

The first step is to set a goal that is meaningful to you. What do you want to achieve in the new year? What are your passions and interests? Once you have a clear idea of what you want to achieve, you can start to break it down into smaller, more manageable steps. For example, if your goal is to lose weight, you can set smaller goals such as eating healthier meals or exercising more often.

It is also important to be realistic about your goals. You can’t expect to achieve everything overnight. Set achievable goals and celebrate your successes along the way. This will help you to stay motivated and on track.

Another important tip is to find an accountability partner. This is someone who will help you to stay on track and motivated. This could be a friend, family member, or even a therapist. Having someone to hold you accountable can make a big difference in your success.

Finally, it is important to be patient with yourself. Change takes time, and there will be setbacks along the way. Do not get discouraged if you do not achieve your goals immediately. Keep working hard, and you will eventually get there.

articles.title: New Year's Lucky Traditions
articles.author: Megan Nim
articles.dek: The new year is a time for new beginnings, and many people have traditions that they follow to bring good luck in the year ahead.
articles.body:
The new year is a time for new beginnings, and many people have traditions that they follow to bring good luck in the year ahead. These traditions vary from culture to culture, but they all have one thing in common: they are meant to bring good fortune.

One popular tradition is to eat a special meal on New Year's Eve. In some cultures, this meal includes lentils, which are said to bring wealth and prosperity. In other cultures, it is customary to eat pork, which is believed to bring good luck. Some people also eat grapes, which are said to bring good luck if you eat 12 of them, one for each month of the year.

Another tradition is to wear certain colors on New Year's Eve. In some cultures, red is considered a lucky color, and people will wear red clothing to bring good luck. In other cultures, it is believed that wearing yellow will bring good luck and prosperity.

Some people also have traditions that involve making noise on New Year's Eve. This is done to scare away evil spirits and to welcome in the new year. This can include fireworks, bells, or even just shouting. Some people also believe that it is important to clean their house on New Year's Eve to get rid of any bad luck from the old year.

There are many other New Year's traditions around the world, such as opening doors and windows to let out the old year and welcome in the new, or throwing your old shoes out the window to get rid of bad luck. Whatever your traditions may be, the new year is a time for hope and new beginnings. It is a time to reflect on the past year and to look forward to the year ahead. It is a time to make resolutions and to set goals for yourself. It is a time to celebrate life and to enjoy the company of loved ones. It is a time to start fresh and to make the most of the year ahead.

articles.title: Lincoln Girls Soccer Has No Trouble Against Wilson

articles.body: Once again, Lincoln’s girls soccer team ran over Wilson with an easy 7-0 victory on Friday, February 28. The Lincoln girls soccer team had an exciting game against Wilson High School. articles.title: Setting a Reset Button
articles.author: Elsa Daily
articles.dek: Student  graphic design students  to guide trick students through setting a reset button for their graphic design students, helping them to set goals and expectations for the new year. "It was fun to make something helpful and interactive for them," said junior Rina Shah. "I hope it helps them get organized and motivated." The students have been working on this project since January. "We wanted to create something that would be useful and engaging," said junior Anya Patel. "We're excited to see how it helps people achieve their goals."
articles.body:
Setting a reset button is like taking a deep breath and starting fresh. It means letting go of the past, accepting the present, and moving forward with a clear mind and a positive attitude. It's about embracing change, learning from mistakes, and growing as individuals.

The start of a new year is a perfect time to set goals and make changes. It's a chance to reflect on what's important, what we want to achieve, and how we can improve ourselves. It's also an opportunity to let go of old habits and embrace new ones. The goal is to be a better version of ourselves.

It is important to set realistic goals that are achievable. Avoid setting yourself up for failure by setting impossible standards. Instead, focus on small, manageable steps that will lead to greater success. Remember, it's better to make progress than to stand still.

It is also important to celebrate your achievements along the way. When you reach a milestone, take a moment to acknowledge your hard work and dedication. This will help you stay motivated and inspired to continue working towards your goals.

Finally, remember that the journey to self-improvement is a marathon, not a sprint. There will be challenges and setbacks along the way, but it's important to stay focused and never give up. With a positive attitude and a clear vision, you can achieve anything you set your mind to.

articles.title: What's On Its Way

articles.body:
In 2026, we can expect a lot of new tech from Apple. The new iPhones are expected to be released in September, and the new MacBook Pro is expected to be released in October. This is a lot of new tech to look forward to!

The new iPhones are expected to have a lot of new features. The new cameras are expected to be better, and the new screens are expected to be brighter. The new phones are also expected to have a lot of new apps. The new MacBook Pro is expected to have a lot of new features. The new processors are expected to be faster, and the new screens are expected to be brighter. The new laptops are also expected to have a lot of new apps.

This is a lot of new tech to look forward to! We can expect a lot of new and exciting things from Apple in 2026.

articles.title: What's Last on its Way Out
articles.author: Megan Nim
articles.dek: New tech is here! With Apple's new iPhones and the new MacBook Pro, there's a lot to look forward to.
articles.body:
The biggest trends in tech right now are the rise of virtual reality, the increasing popularity of smart home devices, and the development of artificial intelligence. These trends are all interconnected and are expected to continue to grow in the coming years.

Virtual reality (VR) is becoming more accessible and affordable, with new headsets and applications being released all the time. VR is being used for gaming, entertainment, education, and even therapy. Smart home devices are becoming more sophisticated and integrated into our lives. From smart thermostats and lighting to security systems and entertainment centers, these devices are making our homes more convenient and efficient. Artificial intelligence (AI) is also rapidly advancing, with new applications being developed for everything from self-driving cars to personalized medicine. AI has the potential to revolutionize many aspects of our lives.

It is difficult to say what exactly will be on its way out, but it is likely that some of the older technologies that are being replaced by these new trends will fall by the wayside. For example, it is possible that we will see a decline in the use of traditional cameras as smartphone cameras continue to improve. Similarly, we may see a decrease in the demand for physical media such as CDs and DVDs as streaming services become more popular.

articles.title: Ringing in Common Year's Superstitions and What They Mean
articles.author: Audrie Ozuna
articles.dek: The end of the year and the New Year is here, and everyone is finding ways to improve their lives and hope for good luck this year.
articles.body:
The end of the year and the New Year is here, and everyone is finding ways to improve their lives and hope for good luck this year. Arising from this hope is a belief in superstitions by some. New Year's superstitions are symbolic rituals and traditions that people follow to bring them good luck and prosperity for the next 365 days. They serve as symbolic rituals to gain a sense of control over some future. They are a way of warding off evil spirits and inviting good fortune. They are a way of celebrating the new year.

The most common New Year's superstitions include eating certain foods, wearing specific colors, and performing certain rituals. For example, in many cultures, it is traditional to eat a meal with 12 different dishes on New Year's Eve, each representing a month of the year. In other cultures, people wear red underwear for good luck and wear white clothes for peace. In other cultures, people jump into the water to wash away their sins.

Many superstitions are associated with food. In the United States, for example, it is customary to eat black-eyed peas on New Year's Day for good luck. In Spain, people eat 12 grapes at midnight on New Year's Eve, one for each month of the year. In Italy, people eat lentil soup for good luck and to bring wealth.

Some superstitions are associated with clothing. In China, people wear red underwear for good luck and to ward off evil spirits. In Mexico, people wear yellow underwear for good luck and to attract wealth. In the Philippines, people wear polka-dotted clothing to bring good luck and to attract wealth.

There are also many superstitions associated with rituals. In the United States, people jump into the water on New Year's Day to wash away their sins and start the new year with a clean slate. In Brazil, people throw flowers into the ocean to honor the sea goddess Yemanjá. In Japan, people visit shrines and temples to pray for good luck and prosperity.

While some people may find these superstitions to be silly or superstitious, they can also be a source of comfort and hope. They can be a way of connecting with our ancestors and preserving our traditions. They can also be a way of celebrating the new year and starting fresh.

articles.title: Panic at the Common App
articles.author: Ryan Liu
articles.dek: If the senior feels unusually tense this month, do not be alarmed. It is simply the information on the Common App.
articles.body:
If the senior feels unusually tense this month, do not be alarmed. It is simply the information on the Common App.

The College Application process is in full swing. For those who are not applying to college, the Common App process will be much simpler. The Common App process is a standardized application that is used by many colleges and universities. It allows students to apply to multiple schools with a single application. This can save students a lot of time and effort.

However, the Common App can also be a source of stress and anxiety for many students. The application requires students to provide a lot of information about themselves, and it can be difficult to know what to include. The essays can be particularly challenging, as students are asked to write about themselves in a way that is both personal and compelling. This is where the graphic design students can help.

For Seniors:

Standardized Tests: Return. The era of widespread "non-exceptional" admissions is shifting. For the Class of 2026, schools are now including Harvard, Stanford, C ol lege, and UT Austin. These have recently updated SAT requirements. Colleges are now looking for more than just SAT scores. They are looking for well-rounded students who have a variety of interests and experiences. They are also looking for students who have a strong academic record and who have demonstrated leadership potential.

The P SS form is open (last day): last year's deadline for 2027 Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) opened on October 1st. This form is mandatory for Federal aid and often required by colleges for financial assistance.

The P SS form is open (last day): last year's deadline for 2027 Application for Federal Student Aid (FAFSA) opened on October 1st. This form is mandatory for Federal aid and often required by colleges for financial assistance.

The FAFSA (Free Application for Federal Student Aid) is a form that students fill out to determine their eligibility for federal student loans, grants, and work-study programs. The FAFSA is required for all students who wish to receive financial aid from the federal government. It is also required by many colleges and universities for students who wish to receive financial aid from those institutions.

The FAFSA form is open from October 1st to June 30th. Students should fill out the form as early as possible, as some financial aid programs have limited funding. The FAFSA form can be filled out online at www.fafsa.ed.gov.

For the Underclassmen:

College Prep for Underclassmen: Colleges review grades ninth grade onward. A strong GPA is built semester by semester. Keep up the hard work. Maintain a strong GPA throughout high school to ensure you are prepared for college. If you are struggling in a particular subject, seek help from your teacher or a tutor. Do not wait until the last minute to start thinking about college. Start planning early and make sure you are taking the right courses.

It is never too early to start thinking about college. The earlier you start, the better prepared you will be. Make sure you are taking the right courses and maintaining a strong GPA. If you are struggling in a particular subject, seek help from your teacher or a tutor. Do not wait until the last minute to start thinking about college. Start planning early and make sure you are taking the right courses.

It is important to remember that colleges look at more than just your grades. They also look at your extracurricular activities, your volunteer work, and your test scores. So, make sure you are involved in activities that you are passionate about and that you are challenging yourself. Do not be afraid to try new things and to step outside of your comfort zone.

articles.title: Australia Bans Social Media - Who Is Next?
articles.author: Yew (Jordan) Yew
articles.dek: Australia has banned social media.
articles.body:
Australia has banned social media. The ban, which went into effect on January 1st, is part of a larger effort to combat the spread of misinformation and hate speech online. The government has also implemented new laws that would require social media companies to remove illegal content within 24 hours of being notified.

The ban has been met with mixed reactions. Some people have praised the government for taking action to protect its citizens, while others have criticized the ban as a violation of freedom of speech. "This is a dangerous precedent to set," said David Smith, a digital rights advocate. "It's a slippery slope that could lead to censorship and government control of information." Others argue that the ban is necessary to protect children from online predators and to prevent the spread of harmful content. "We need to protect our children," said Sarah Jones, a mother of two. "Social media is a breeding ground for all sorts of dangerous content, and we need to do something about it." The government of Australia has implemented a ban on social media in an effort to combat the spread of misinformation and hate speech online. The ban, which went into effect on January 1st, has been met with mixed reactions. Some people have praised the government for taking action to protect its citizens, while others have criticized the ban as a violation of freedom of speech.

Social media is a powerful tool that can be used for good or evil. It can be used to connect people, share information, and organize social movements. However, it can also be used to spread misinformation, hate speech, and propaganda. The Australian government's decision to ban social media is a controversial one, and it remains to be seen what the long-term consequences will be. However, it is clear that social media is a double-edged sword, and it is up to us to use it responsibly.

articles.title: "Fake News," Bias, and Misinformation - How are you getting your news?
articles.author: Rebecca Medrano
articles.dek: In today's world, it's easy to get caught up in the cycle of "fake news," bias, and misinformation.
articles.body:
In today's world, it's easy to get caught up in the cycle of "fake news," bias, and misinformation. With so much information available at our fingertips, it's hard to know what to believe. We are constantly bombarded with news from various sources, and it's easy to get swept up in the tide of sensationalism and biased reporting. It's important to be aware of the different types of misinformation and to develop critical thinking skills to discern truth from falsehood.

The term "fake news" refers to false or misleading information that is presented as news. It can be spread intentionally to deceive people, or it can be spread unintentionally by people who are not aware that they are sharing false information. Fake news can take many forms, including fabricated stories, manipulated images, and deceptive headlines. It can also be spread through social media, email, and other online platforms.

Bias is another common problem in the media. Bias is a tendency to favor one point of view over another. It can be conscious or unconscious. When a news source is biased, it may present information in a way that favors a particular political party, ideology, or group. This can make it difficult for readers to get a balanced and objective understanding of the issues.

Misinformation is a broader term that refers to any false or inaccurate information. It can be spread intentionally or unintentionally. Misinformation can be spread through various channels, including social media, word-of-mouth, and even traditional media outlets. It is important to be aware of the different types of misinformation and to develop critical thinking skills to discern truth from falsehood.

The media plays a crucial role in shaping public opinion. It is therefore essential for us to be critical consumers of news and to be aware of the potential for "fake news," bias, and misinformation. By developing strong critical thinking skills, we can become more informed and responsible citizens.

articles.title: The US Military Operation in Venezuela: What is it About?
articles.author: Aaron Ortiz
articles.dek: The US military operation in Venezuela is a complex issue with a long history.
articles.body:
The US military operation in Venezuela is a complex issue with a long history. The US has been involved in Venezuela's affairs for decades, supporting various political factions and attempting to influence the country's oil production. In recent years, the US has increased its military presence in the region, citing concerns about drug trafficking and political instability.

The current operation is part of a broader US strategy to promote democracy and stability in Latin America. The US military has been training Venezuelan soldiers and providing humanitarian aid to the Venezuelan people. However, the operation has also been criticized by some as an attempt to interfere in Venezuela's internal affairs and to destabilize the country. The US military's involvement in Venezuela has been a subject of much debate and controversy.

articles.title: This Will Happen Again
articles.author: Janine M. Martinez Hernandez
articles.dek: The Renee Nicole Good Incident
articles.body:
On January 3rd, Renee Nicole Good, a 37-year-old US citizen and mother of three, was detained by immigration officials at Minneapolis-St. Paul International Airport. Good was on her way to visit her family in Mexico when she was stopped by Customs and Border Protection officers who ordered her to exit the vehicle, which after her exit, her car was moved, and an ICE agent fired shots into her vehicle. Good was later released from custody and her car was impounded.

The incident has sparked outrage among immigration activists and politicians, who are calling for an investigation into the incident. They are also calling for an end to the "zero tolerance" policy that they say is separating families and causing undue hardship. Good's case is not an isolated one. There have been numerous reports of immigrants being mistreated and abused by immigration officials. The "zero tolerance" policy has been widely condemned by human rights organizations and international bodies. They say that it is a violation of international law and that it is causing irreparable harm to families. The incident involving Renee Nicole Good is a tragic example of the human cost of the "zero tolerance" policy. It is important to remember that behind every case is a human being with a story and a family.

articles.title: Yes, There Are Things to Love About Love
articles.author: Ruby Campos
articles.dek: Los Angeles has many fun and festive activities to enjoy during the holiday season.
articles.body:
Los Angeles has many fun and festive activities to enjoy during the holiday season. From ice skating and Christmas lights to winter markets and holiday parades, there is something for everyone. One of the most popular holiday traditions is the Christmas tree lighting ceremony. This year, the city will be hosting its annual Christmas tree lighting ceremony on December 1st at Grand Park. The event will feature a live band, food trucks, and a fireworks display. Another popular tradition is the holiday market, which will be held from November 25th to December 24th at Pershing Square. The market will feature a variety of vendors selling handmade gifts, decorations, and food. The city will also be hosting a variety of other events, including ice skating at the Staples Center and a holiday parade down Hollywood Boulevard.

Los Angeles has many fun and festive activities to enjoy during the holiday season. From ice skating and Christmas lights to winter markets and holiday parades, there is something for everyone. One of the most popular holiday traditions is the Christmas tree lighting ceremony. This year, the city will be hosting its annual Christmas tree lighting ceremony on December 1st at Grand Park. The market will feature a variety of vendors selling handmade gifts, decorations, and food. The city will also be hosting a variety of other events, including ice skating at the Staples Center and a holiday parade down Hollywood Boulevard.

The holiday season is a time for celebration and joy. It is also a time for reflection and gratitude. As we enjoy the festive activities and traditions of the season, let us take a moment to appreciate the things that we are grateful for. Let us also take a moment to remember those who are less fortunate and to offer them our support. The holiday season is a time for giving, and let us all strive to make a difference in the lives of others.

articles.title: Love Is In The Air! And So Is Advice!
articles.author: Sophia Miranda
articles.dek: The advice given here is intended to be general in nature and food for thought only.
articles.body:
I want to take my partner to do community service for the day because it would be for us to do something impactful for our community. They want us to spend the time together alone. What should I do? This time for love. I have plans to volunteer in the morning then have time for dinner at night.

Is a made gift better than a bought one.

When a double-made gift is better than a bought one. It shows that you care in a special way!

I don't have a valentine as usual, and I'm sad and lonely. What should I do? This time I have created special love and try to give back! Maybe spend the day with my sister or maybe she got her some treat. Or spend the day giving back maybe at the shelter.

Is it okay to celebrate Valentine's Day with friends instead of a partner?

Yes! Spend the day with people you love and make it special.

I would say to just appreciate what you get since you Valentine’s Day is about spending the day with someone you love not about materialistic things.

We have been going out for a year and the spark has fizzled. Any suggestions? Yes! Let's spark up your relationship, try new things like a new restaurant or something romantic and words of affirmation to show them you are still in love with them. The key to being in a relationship is to not like you both are still dating. Try to know them and make sure to effort.

Is there any reason I shouldn't send Valentines to my friends?

No! Not at all! Everyone is in different places in their life and there is never a need to be behind! But on everyone is in a different path.

How do you know when you are in love?

When you feel that pit in your stomach when you're around them and when all you want to do is be around and talk to them and have an overwhelming feeling of happiness.

How do I reject someone politely?

One way to reject someone politely is to say you are not looking for a relationship or anything romantic right now.

articles.title: We Asked... You Answered!
articles.author: The Railsplitter
articles.dek: The Railsplitter editors asked seniors: "How would you define a successful relationship?"
articles.body:
I would define a successful relationship as one that has clear and direct communication. Where they trust each other, where they are able to communicate their independence and find happiness on their own and pursue their passion while supporting the other in their own decisions. Being able to rely, trust, and communicate with each other.

Strong, truthful, and willing.

Understanding right things they mention, and communication.

Being able to choose each other even when it's hard. Both are satisfied.

One person being respect on both sides, trust, and both individuals feeling supported.

Loyalty and communication.

When you can do anything when you both trust each other as well as care for each other.

When you both effort than making something because you love them without the expectation of getting something factual.

Being able to be your self with each other.

I think a successful relationship is one where the people in have a favorite of positive interactions with each other. People with successful relationships enjoy the time they spend with their significant other and don't fight often. Fights, if they do happen are quick and resolved in good communication. In general, people in successful relationships have good communication and treat each other with kindness.

Communication and no toxicity.
